title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-50052
id: df8d0dbd-ad48-5482-98ff-c8be90fe7c70
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-50052 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50052
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/03
modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-50052 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-03T08:24:08Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-50052", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-50052 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1034979; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-03, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Why an HP Poly VoIP Phones Bug Could Become an Enterprise Foothold
id: ae0a5e17-646e-5df0-8975-c0249b8410c6
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Why an HP Poly VoIP Phones Bug Could Become an Enterprise Foothold (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: PHISHING
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Why an HP Poly VoIP Phones Bug Could Become an Enterprise Foothold
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/03
modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_email:
        EventID: 28
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - '.hta'
            - '.lnk'
            - '.iso'
            - '.vhd'
            - '.docm'
    selection_network:
        DestinationHostname|endswith:
            - '.xyz'
            - '.top'
            - '.pw'
            - '.cc'
        DestinationPort: 443
    condition: selection_email or selection_network
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate file downloads from CDNs
    - Business email with ISO attachments
